sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales_data(`transaction_date` Date, `product_id` UInt32, `amount` Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE monthly_sales AS SELECT toStartOfMonth(transaction_date) AS month, SUM(amount) AS total_sales FROM sales_data GROUP BY month;
SELECT transaction_date, amount, lagInFrame(amount, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY transaction_date ASC) AS previous_transaction_amount FROM sales_data ORDER BY transaction_date ASC;
UPDATE sales_data SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE product_id = 1;
